code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n > t
        if first
          out = "#{n}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{n}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  println(out)
  Ok(())
end
